items.title_en: Brent oil dips below $80 as postponed U.S.-Iran talks temper optimism over ceasefire progress
items.title_zh: 由于推迟的美伊谈判削弱了对停火进展的乐观情绪，布伦特原油跌破80美元
items.desc_en: With immediate supply fears fading and tanker traffic returning to the Strait of Hormuz, traders are turning their attention back to oil demand and OPEC's outlook for the market.
items.desc_zh: 随着当前供应担忧的消退以及油轮运输返回霍尔木兹海峡，交易商将注意力重新转向石油需求和欧佩克对市场的前景。

items.title_en: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'

items.title_en: In photos: Star-studded crowd gathers to celebrate the Obama Presidential Center dedication
items.title_zh: 照片中：众星云集，庆祝奥巴马总统中心落成
items.desc_en: Barack Obama opened his presidential center in Chicago with former presidents, celebrities and dignitaries in attendance. President Donald Trump was absent.
items.desc_zh: 巴拉克·奥巴马 (Barack Obama) 在芝加哥开设了他的总统中心，前总统、名人和政要出席了仪式。唐纳德·特朗普总统缺席。

items.title_en: Midjourney Scanner
items.title_zh: Midjourney Scanner
items.desc_en: 60 second ultrasound-based full-body scanner that beats MRI
items.desc_zh: 60 秒超声波全身扫描仪，优于 MRI

items.title_en: Trump DNI pick Pulte poised to get access to U.S. intelligence despite congressional bid to thwart
items.title_zh: 特朗普国家情报总监任命普尔特准备接触美国情报，尽管国会试图阻止
items.desc_en: With President Donald Trump halting his nomination of  U.S. Attorney Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence, Bill Pulte is set to take on the role.
items.desc_zh: 随着唐纳德·特朗普总统停止提名美国检察官杰伊·克莱顿担任国家情报总监，比尔·普尔特将接任这一职务。

items.title_en: Parents of Serbia's teenage school shooter given jail terms in retrial
items.title_zh: 塞尔维亚青少年校园枪击案凶手的父母在重审中被判入狱
items.desc_en: The boy was 13 when he killed eight girls, a boy and a school guard at Vladislav Ribnikar school in Belgrade in 2023.
items.desc_zh: 2023 年，13 岁的男孩在贝尔格莱德的 Vladislav Ribnikar 学校杀害了 8 名女孩、一名男孩和一名学校警卫。

items.title_en: Bowen: US-Iran deal raises inescapable question of what the war was for
items.title_zh: 鲍文：美伊协议引发了不可避免的问题：战争的目的是什么
items.desc_en: While the human cost is clear, the Iranian regime has not just survived the war, it has been empowered.
items.desc_zh: 虽然人员伤亡是显而易见的，但伊朗政权不仅在战争中幸存下来，而且还获得了权力。

items.title_en: OPEC chief dismisses IEA supply glut forecast as 'critical' Strait of Hormuz reopens
items.title_zh: 欧佩克主席驳斥了国际能源署供应过剩的预测，因为“关键”霍尔木兹海峡重新开放
items.desc_en: The IEA said on Wednesday that a lasting resolution to the conflict could drive a surge in supply volumes and trigger a major oil overhang next year.
items.desc_zh: 国际能源署周三表示，持久解决冲突可能会推动供应量激增，并引发明年的重大石油供应过剩。

items.title_en: GTA 6 pre-order date and cover art revealed by Rockstar
items.title_zh: Rockstar 公布《GTA 6》预购日期和封面艺术
items.desc_en: The developer has said pre-sales of the hugely anticipated game will begin on 25 June.
items.desc_zh: 开发商表示，这款备受期待的游戏将于 6 月 25 日开始预售。

items.title_en: Hegseth says some Nato allies will fail as he announces US review of Europe forces
items.title_zh: 赫格斯称，当他宣布美国对欧洲军队进行审查时，一些北约盟友将会失败
items.desc_en: The US defence secretary's move follows a US decision to scale back its commitments to a high readiness force within the alliance.
items.desc_zh: 在美国国防部长采取这一举措之前，美国决定缩减对联盟内高度戒备部队的承诺。

items.title_en: Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
items.title_zh: 莫斯科遭遇俄罗斯全面战争爆发以来最大规模的乌克兰袭击
items.desc_en: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.
items.desc_zh: 近 200 架乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯首都东南部的一个地区，一座炼油厂和一座购物中心被烧毁。

items.title_en: Gunfire and explosions heard at Niger capital's airport
items.title_zh: 尼日尔首都机场传出枪声和爆炸声
items.desc_en: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.
items.desc_zh: 尼日尔十年来一直在与激进的伊斯兰叛乱分子作战，今年一月，疑似圣战分子袭击了同一机场。

items.title_en: AI will create more jobs for humans, not replace them, Amaon founder Bezos says
items.title_zh: Amon创始人贝佐斯表示，人工智能将为人类创造更多就业机会，而不是取代他们
items.desc_en: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.
items.desc_zh: 这位亚马逊创始人现在拥有机器人和太空旅行公司，他认为人工智能将造成劳动力短缺。

items.title_en: Google, Nvidia and Anthropic bosses' AI tips for students
items.title_zh: 谷歌、英伟达和 Anthropic 老板给学生的人工智能建议
items.desc_en: Sundar Pichai, Jensen Huang and Jack Clark share their advice with the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 桑达尔·皮查伊 (Sundar Pichai)、黄仁勋 (Jensen Huang) 和杰克·克拉克 (Jack Clark) 与 BBC 分享了他们的建议。

items.title_en: Snap unveils $2,195 smart glasses after previous flops
items.title_zh: Snap 继之前的失败后推出售价 2,195 美元的智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.
items.desc_zh: Snapchat 母公司的增强现实眼镜预计将于秋季发货。

items.title_en: Five big questions about the UK's under-16s social media ban
items.title_zh: 关于英国 16 岁以下青少年社交媒体禁令的五个大问题
items.desc_en: A ban is coming - but it's still not clear what it will mean for sites including Roblox, YouTube and WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: 一项禁令即将出台，但目前尚不清楚这对 Roblox、YouTube 和 WhatsApp 等网站意味着什么。

items.title_en: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
items.title_zh: Helium-3 是什么？我们可以从月球上获取它吗？
items.desc_en: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.
items.desc_zh: Hel-3 价格昂贵，而且需求预计会猛增，因此一些人计划在月球上开采它。

items.title_en: Under-16s will be banned from social media from early 2027
items.title_zh: 从 2027 年初起，16 岁以下青少年将被禁止使用社交媒体
items.desc_en: Sites including Instagram, YouTube and TikTok will become inaccessible for millions of children, the prime minister has announced.
items.desc_zh: 总理宣布，数百万儿童将无法访问 Instagram、YouTube 和 TikTok 等网站。

items.title_zh: 社交媒体禁令——大胆而直率，但没有灵丹妙药

items.desc_zh: BBC 技术编辑佐伊·克莱曼 (Zoe Kleinman) 讲述年轻人上网即将发生的重大变化。

items.title_en: What is the UK social media ban for under-16s?
items.title_zh: 英国针对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体禁令是什么？
items.desc_en: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat blocked for UK teens early in 2027.
items.desc_zh: 这些措施将使英国青少年在 2027 年初屏蔽 TikTok 和 Snapchat 等应用程序。
